asset_name: UI atlas — judgement popup and combo flame set
shared_properties: All feedback cells use the same compact atlas format and align to a shared baseline.
Warm cream and gold tones keep positive feedback bright without clashing with the autumn palette.
Letterforms stay bold enough for a 0.5 second on-screen lifetime.
differences: This atlas packages the three judgement labels and the combo flame badge used during live play.
PERFECT is the brightest cell to emphasize the strongest timing reward immediately.
MISS adopts a darker warning tone so the failure state stands apart from the reward cells.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the core loop, timing windows, obstacle pacing, UI layout, and Bevy target constraints.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the sepia autumn atmosphere, tree silhouettes, and warm color layering.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-driven UI entity set for transient judgement and combo feedback anchored above the player sprite.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/art_000018.png during UI boot and select atlas cells for PERFECT, GOOD, MISS, and combo flame states.
runtime_notes: Spawn the popup about 40px above the player anchor and fade it over 0.5 seconds through code-side opacity changes.
Keep the atlas cells compact so transient feedback can coexist with obstacles and the rhythm lane in capture frames.
Expose atlas indices and color metadata so replay review tools can reconstruct the exact judgement label used.

context.usage: Compact atlas for PERFECT, GOOD, MISS, and combo flame feedback near the player.

shape.silhouette: Four-cell UI atlas containing PERFECT, GOOD, MISS, and a flame badge for combo emphasis.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 320x64px with 4 cells of 80x64px and 0px spacing.
PERFECT uses the brightest cream-gold treatment, GOOD uses a calmer gold treatment, and MISS keeps a darker warning tone.
The combo flame remains legible when composited near the player and over the dark rhythm lane panel.
